forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

toast.forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
toast.forgotPasswordError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
